message:
feat(fcp-core): add Policy Engine, CRDT, and utility modules

Add three foundational modules to fcp-core for FCP2 compliance:

## Policy Engine (policy.rs)
- ZonePolicyObject: Zone-bound policy with allow/deny pattern lists
- ZoneTransportPolicy: DERP/Funnel/LAN transport permissions
- RoleGraph: DAG-based role inheritance with cycle detection
- PolicyEngine::evaluate_invoke(): Full evaluation pipeline
- DecisionReasonCode: 24 stable reason codes for denials/allows
- PolicyPattern: Glob-style pattern matching for principals/connectors/capabilities
- SanitizerReceipt validation for taint flag clearing
- ApprovalToken handling (Elevation, Declassification, Execution)

## CRDT Module (crdt.rs)
- CrdtActorId: Actor identifier for distributed operations
- LwwEntry/LwwMap: Last-write-wins map with timestamp + actor tie-breaker
- OrSet/OrSetTag: Observed-remove set for add-wins semantics
- GCounter: Grow-only counter (increment only)
- PnCounter: Positive-negative counter (increment/decrement)
- All CRDTs support deterministic merge for mesh replication

## Utility Module (util/)
- hex_or_bytes: Serde module for dual hex/binary serialization
  - Human-readable formats get hex strings
  - Binary formats get raw bytes
  - Supports fixed-size arrays with length validation

These modules enable mechanical policy enforcement and conflict-free
state replication across the FCP2 mesh network.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+//! Utility modules for FCP Core.
+
+pub mod hex_or_bytes;
